title: Spicy Smoky Roasted Croatian Mincemeat Hash
description: A hearty, Ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly meal prep dish featuring Croatian mincemeat, stir-fried with spices and smoky flavor. Serve with your choice of toast or as a side dish.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the Croatian mincemeat and cook, breaking up with a spoon, until no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the cayenne pepper and smoked paprika. Cook for 1 minute.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Drizzle with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve with lemon wedges on the side.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
